title: Services | Piel en Armonia
description: Dermatology routes in Quito with clinical criteria, indicated technology, and measurable follow-up.
heading: Dermatology routes
introTitle: Choose your route with clinical criteria and clear language
introDeck: This catalogue organizes routes by medical need so you know what to expect at each stage.

featured.title: Comprehensive diagnosis unit
featured.copy: Full reading of skin, hair, and nails to start treatment with clear priorities.

featured.title: Case-indicated dermatology laser
featured.copy: Protocols calibrated by phototype, lesion profile, and tolerance for safer decisions.

featured.title: Telemedicine with responsible escalation
featured.copy: The remote route defines your next step and escalates to clinic when needed.

sections.title: Clinical core
sections.deck: Routes for diagnostic depth and control of frequent conditions through staged follow-up.

cards.title: Comprehensive diagnosis
cards.copy: Initial map of risk, priorities, and therapeutic direction.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea
cards.copy: Flare and sensitivity control with stage-based goals.

cards.title: Skin cancer
cards.copy: Early assessment of lesions with warning signs.

sections.title: Medical procedures
sections.deck: Interventions indicated by dermatology criteria for texture, tone, and structural support.

cards.title: Dermatology laser
cards.copy: Traceable parameters for lesions, scars, and rejuvenation goals.

cards.title: Chemical peel
cards.copy: Skin renewal with formula selection by clinical profile.

cards.title: Collagen biostimulators
cards.copy: Progressive support for firmness and structure under medical control.

sections.title: Continuity and family care
sections.deck: Programs for long-term follow-up, mixed cases, and family guidance.

cards.title: Pediatric dermatology
cards.copy: Clear plans for children and teenagers with caregiver guidance.

cards.title: Skin, hair and nails
cards.copy: Cross-route care for combined symptoms and variable progression.

cards.title: Telemedicine
cards.copy: Remote guidance to decide whether to continue online or escalate.

initiatives.title: Comparative clinical imaging
initiatives.copy: A consistent visual record to measure change at each review stage.

initiatives.title: Active flare pathway
initiatives.copy: Early adjustments when relapse or rising sensitivity appears.

initiatives.title: Family decision plan
initiatives.copy: Symptom guidance, warning signs, and practical next steps for home care.

initiatives.title: Pigmented lesion pathway
initiatives.copy: Prioritization of in-clinic review and follow-up for changing lesions.

initiatives.title: Phototype calibration
initiatives.copy: Energy and frequency tuned to measured skin response.

initiatives.title: Skin support sequence
initiatives.copy: Session combinations that improve texture and firmness over realistic timelines.

initiatives.title: Clear consent and privacy
initiatives.copy: The legal framework explains responsibilities in plain, usable language.

initiatives.title: Responsible remote escalation
initiatives.copy: Clear criteria define when online care is enough and when it is not.

bookingStatus.title: Transactional schedule in update
bookingStatus.description: While this phase is completed, you can review active routes and request first guidance through telemedicine.
